name: Portuguese Sweet Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into pieces
1 teaspoon King Arthur special instant yeast (formulated for sweet breads)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in the order specified by your bread machine.
2. Set the machine to the basic white bread setting.
3. Watch the mixture as it rises; ensure it does not rise too much.
